name: pi-venice-image
description: Venice image-generation tool for the pi coding agent. Registers `venice_generate_image` (single image) and `venice_generate_images` (batch), powered by the Venice /image/generate endpoint. Default model is taken from the agentchatbox picker's live selection (read from $HOME/.config/acb/image-model each call), falling back to env VENICE_IMAGE_MODEL, then z-image-turbo.
